zh.York, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾約克
zh.Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, Englan: 英國越可爾普倫普頓 在 斯波福斯
zh.St Lawrences Church, Towcester, Northamp: 英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾堂可斯特聖 勞倫也斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Plumpton於1415年出生在英國越可爾普倫普頓 在 斯波福斯時，他的父親William Plumpton15歲，母親Alice Foljambe29歲。他於1437年與Mary Hill在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾堂可斯特聖 勞倫也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1478年在英國英格蘭越可爾約克享年63歲，埋葬在英國越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: Plumpton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English plūme, plȳme ‘plum, plum tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, including Plumpton (Yorkshire, Northamptonshire, Sussex, Cumbria), Fieldplumpton or Woodplumpton (Lancashire), Plympton (Devon), and a lost Plumpton in Kingsbury (Warwicks).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Plumpton was born in 1415, in Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England, his father, William Plumpton, was 15 and his mother, Alice Foljambe, was 29. He married Mary Hill in 1437, in St Lawrence's Church, Towcester, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1478, in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in York, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Plumpton est né en 1415, à Plumpton in Spofforth, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Plumpton, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Alice Foljambe, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Mary Hill en 1437, à St Lawrence's Church, Towcester, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1478, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à York, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.St Lawrences Church, Towcester, Northamp: St Lawrence's Church, Towcester, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Plumpton 1415 in Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Plumpton 15 und seine Mutter Alice Foljambe 29. Er hat 1437 in St Lawrence's Church, Towcester, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Mary Hill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1478 im Alter von 63 Jahren in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in York, Yorkshire, England begraben.

ko.St Lawrences Church, Towcester, Northamp: 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 타우스스터 스트 로렌스'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Robert Plumpton(이)가 1415년 영국 요르크실르 플럼프턴 인 스포포스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Plumpton(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Foljambe(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1437년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 타우스스터 스트 로렌스'스 처르치에서 Mary Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1478년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

ru.St Lawrences Church, Towcester, Northamp: ст ларенсе'с чурч, тоусестир, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Plumpton родился в 1415 г. в местности плумптон ин споффорт, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Plumpton было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Foljambe, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Hill в 1437 г. в местности ст ларенсе'с чурч, тоусестир, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1478 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия.
